## BuiltIn.BuiltInData.getRecipesDirectory() method

Gets the recipes directory from the built-in library tree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static getRecipesDirectory(): Result<FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem&gt;

`Success` with the recipes directory, or `Failure` if not found.
